architecture_fit.note: Single hand-set multi-head self-attention block (real softmax over N×N on CUDA); only delta from base_model is min-readout = AND, minimal and well-motivated.

baseline_comparison.note: No-composition last-token linear baseline computed under identical conditions; lift +0.54 at canonical and baseline collapses with L while matcher stays flat.

faithfulness.note: Synthetic attempt with no trained model; README states this explicitly and proposes the exact head-knockout AND→OR ablation, meeting the synthetic bar, but does not execute it.

operating_range.note: Full L=1..6 composition-depth sweep × 10 seeds with sharpness flat near 0.98 throughout; covers the goal's relevant axis though not a literal 2-order scale span.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entirely hand-built circuit — weights derived analytically from pattern+embed with no training, reproducing the target behaviour.

visual_judgement.note: Two well-aimed panels: single-example attention vs true match-ends with 1/N threshold, plus sweep summary with baseline overlay and FPR/FNR curves.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties each panel to the goal's two questions, justifies axes (sharpness vs composition depth) and the baseline gap as the lift.

notes: A clean, analytically hand-built multi-head attention circuit that solves regex-like matching as a minimal delta from base_model, with the key insight (min = AND across concrete offsets) fixing the prior summing/OR flaw. Metrics are excellent: length_robustness 0.999, canonical sharpness 0.98, lift +0.54 over a baseline that collapses with L. Main gap is faithfulness — being synthetic, it proposes but does not run the head-ablation causal check it describes.
